caption: A man with a gray, peaked wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a room filled with framed photographs. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm, appearing to speak as his facial expression and mouth position shift slightly throughout the sequence. In the background, several framed photos are mounted on a wall, and clothing items are visible on a rack. A logo appearing in the lower-left and center-right of the scene contains the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same seated position, but his head tilts and his expression changes, indicating he is in the middle of a conversation or recording a session.
